meta.title: Spelling Bee
meta.subject: general
meta.description: Sharpen your spelling skills! Listen to the clue and type each word correctly.

items.front: 🐘 How do you spell the largest land animal?
items.back:
E - L - E - P - H - A - N - T

elephant

An elephant is the biggest land animal on Earth!
items.hint: It has a trunk and big ears

items.front: 🦋 How do you spell the insect that starts as a caterpillar?
items.back:
B - U - T - T - E - R - F - L - Y

butterfly

A butterfly goes through metamorphosis from a caterpillar!

items.front: 🌈 How do you spell what appears after rain?
items.back:
R - A - I - N - B - O - W

rainbow

A rainbow forms when sunlight shines through water droplets!

items.front: 🍓 How do you spell this red berry fruit?
items.back:
S - T - R - A - W - B - E - R - R - Y

strawberry

Strawberries are sweet red fruits that grow close to the ground!
items.hint: Red, sweet, and grows in gardens

items.front: 🏔️ How do you spell a very tall landform?
items.back:
M - O - U - N - T - A - I - N

mountain

Mount Everest is the tallest mountain in the world!
items.hint: Tall, rocky, and has a peak

items.front: 🌻 How do you spell this tall yellow flower?
items.back:
S - U - N - F - L - O - W - E - R

sunflower

Sunflowers always turn to face the sun during the day!

items.front: 🦁 How do you spell the king of the jungle?
items.back:
L - I - O - N

lion

Lions live in groups called prides on the African savanna!

items.front: 🌊 How do you spell a body of salty water?
items.back:
O - C - E - A - N

ocean

Oceans cover more than 70% of the Earth's surface!
